name: Okta Group Grants Admin-Like Application Access
description: Detects Okta groups that are assigned to applications with admin-like names.
query: SELECT a.assignee_id AS group_id, COALESCE(g.name, a.assignee_id) AS group_name, a.app_id, COALESCE(a.app_label, app.label, app.name) AS app_name FROM okta_app_assignments a LEFT JOIN okta_groups g ON g.id = a.assignee_id LEFT JOIN okta_applications app ON app.id = a.app_id WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(a.assignee_type, '')) = 'GROUP' AND LOWER(COALESCE(a.status, 'active')) IN ('active', 'assigned') AND LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_label, app.label, app.name, '')) RLIKE '.*(admin|administrator|console|root|super).*'
remediation: Review group-to-app assignments and split broad admin app access into least-privilege, purpose-scoped groups.
